reasoning: The CCCS AU-6 control focuses on the review, analysis, and reporting of audit records. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled, logs are analyzed regularly, retention policies are configured, and alerts are set up for significant events. These checks ensure that audit records are not only collected but also actively monitored and analyzed, aligning with the control's requirements.
title: CCCS AU-6: Audit Record Review, Analysis, and Reporting
